exploit.exploit_path: HTTP GET parameter 'username' is passed directly to shell_exec() without sanitization.
exploit.verification_method: Send HTTP GET request with the payload in the 'username' parameter. If the response contains 'AUDITAGENTX_RCE_1337', the command injection succeeded.
exploit.impact: Remote Code Execution (RCE) - the attacker can execute arbitrary system commands on the web server.

runtime.reason: 未匹配专用规则，默认尝试函数级 Harness 验证（HTTP 未复现，但目标函数级 Harness 已触发该漏洞）

detail.reason: 未匹配专用规则，默认尝试函数级 Harness 验证（HTTP 未复现，但目标函数级 Harness 已触发该漏洞）

harness.harness_code:
<?php
$mock_calls = [];
function mock_shell_exec($cmd) {
    global $mock_calls;
    $mock_calls[] = $cmd;
    return '';
}

function vulnerable($username) {
    echo mock_shell_exec($username);
}

$payloads = ["", "id", ";id", "|id", "&id", "`id`", "echo hello", "Admin", "1;ls"];

$triggered = false;
$target_function_called = false;
$sink_called = false;
$captured_argument = "";
$trigger_payload = "";
$trigger_detail = "";

foreach ($payloads as $payload) {
    $mock_calls = [];
    vulnerable($payload);
    $target_function_called = true;
    if (!empty($mock_calls)) {
        $sink_called = true;
        $cmd = $mock_calls[0];
        if (preg_match('/[;&|`]/', $cmd) !== 0) {
            $triggered = true;
            $captured_argument = $cmd;
            $trigger_payload = $payload;
            $trigger_detail = "Command injection via shell_exec with argument: " . $cmd;
            break;
        }
    }
}

$result = [
    "triggered" => $triggered,
    "target_function_called" => $target_function_called,
    "sink_called" => $sink_called,
    "sink_name" => "shell_exec",
    "captured_argument" => $captured_argument,
    "payload" => $trigger_payload,
    "trigger_detail" => $trigger_detail
];
echo "AUDITAGENTX_RESULT_JSON=" . json_encode($result) . "\n";
if ($triggered) {
    echo "AUDITAGENTX_VULN_TRIGGERED\n";
} else {
    echo "AUDITAGENTX_NO_TRIGGER\n";
}
harness.trigger_detail: Command injection via shell_exec with argument: ;id

AUDITAGENTX_VULN_TRIGGERED

AUDITAGENTX_VULN_TRIGGERED

verification_checks: Confirm the user-controlled value is concatenated or joined into a filesystem path.
Check whether the code canonicalizes the path (realpath/abspath) and enforces an allowlisted base directory.
If a local target runs, send ../ or encoded ..%2f payloads for a known file (app config, /etc/passwd) and look for file contents in the response.
If no target exists, record dynamic_verdict=not_executed instead of not_reproduced.
false_positive_signals: The resolved path is validated to stay under an allowlisted base directory.
The filename is a fixed server-side constant or comes from a strict allowlist.
The framework normalizes and rejects traversal sequences before use.
remediation: Canonicalize the path and confirm it stays under an allowlisted base directory.
Reject traversal sequences and use safe file APIs.

security_knowledge.title: SQL Injection
security_knowledge.summary: Externally influenced input is used to construct SQL without sufficient separation between data and query structure.
verification_checks: Confirm user-controlled input reaches SQL construction or execution.
Confirm the query is built with string concatenation, interpolation, or formatting.
Confirm no prepared statement, parameter binding, or strong type conversion separates data from SQL.
false_positive_signals: The sink uses parameter placeholders with a separate parameter tuple/list.
The value is converted to a strict numeric type before reaching SQL.
The SQL statement is a static literal and user input is not interpolated.
remediation: Use prepared statements or parameterized queries.
Do not concatenate user-controlled strings into SQL.
Run database users with least privilege and avoid detailed SQL errors in responses.

security_knowledge.title: Insecure Deserialization
security_knowledge.summary: Untrusted data is deserialized without validation, allowing object injection or remote code execution.
owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
verification_checks: Confirm untrusted input is passed to a deserialization sink.
Confirm the deserializer can instantiate arbitrary classes or call __reduce__.
Confirm no integrity check (HMAC/signature) protects the serialized blob.
false_positive_signals: Only json.loads / yaml.safe_load is used on the untrusted data.
The serialized data is signed and verified before deserialization.
The input is a trusted, application-generated constant.
remediation: Prefer safe formats (JSON) and safe loaders (yaml.safe_load).
Never deserialize untrusted data with pickle/unserialize/ObjectInputStream.
If unavoidable, sign+verify payloads and restrict allowed classes.

exploit.exploit_path: HTTP GET parameter 'cmd' is passed directly to shell_exec() or similar function without sanitization.
exploit.exploit_code:
import requests

url = "http://localhost/CommandExecution/CommandExec-2.php"
payload = "echo AUDITAGENTX_RCE_1337"
params = {"cmd": payload}
response = requests.get(url, params=params)
print(response.text)
exploit.verification_method: Send a GET request with the payload in the 'cmd' parameter and check if the response contains the string 'AUDITAGENTX_RCE_1337'.
exploit.impact: Remote Code Execution (RCE) allowing arbitrary command execution on the server.

runtime.reason: 未匹配专用规则，默认尝试函数级 Harness 验证

detail.reason: 未匹配专用规则，默认尝试函数级 Harness 验证

harness.harness_code:
<?php
// Mock shell_exec to record calls
$mock_shell_exec_calls = [];
function mock_shell_exec($command) {
    global $mock_shell_exec_calls;
    $mock_shell_exec_calls[] = $command;
    return ''; // Mock return, never execute
}

// Inlined vulnerable function from CommandExec-2.php
function vulnerable($target) {
    // Original code: echo shell_exec($target);
    // Using mock function instead
    echo mock_shell_exec($target);
    if ($_GET["typeBox"] == "Trochilidae") {
        echo "Welldone! You did great job.";
    }
}

// Payloads
$payloads = [
    "127.0.0.1",
    "; id",
    "| whoami",
    "`id`",
    "&& dir",
    "|| echo vulnerable"
];

$triggered = false;
$final_payload = '';
$final_argument = '';
$trigger_detail = '';

foreach ($payloads as $p) {
    $mock_shell_exec_calls = [];
    // Reset $_GET for each iteration (simulate)
    $_GET = ['typeBox' => ''];
    vulnerable($p);
    if (!empty($mock_shell_exec_calls)) {
        $arg = $mock_shell_exec_calls[0];
        // Check if the argument contains dangerous patterns
        if (preg_match('/[;&|`$\n]/', $arg) && $arg !== '127.0.0.1') {
            $triggered = true;
            $final_payload = $p;
            $final_argument = $arg;
            $trigger_detail = "Sink called with malicious argument: $arg";
            break;
        }
    }
}

// Output structured result
$result = [
    'triggered' => $triggered,
    'target_function_called' => true,
    'sink_called' => true,
    'sink_name' => 'shell_exec',
    'captured_argument' => $final_argument,
    'payload' => $final_payload,
    'trigger_detail' => $trigger_detail
];
echo "AUDITAGENTX_RESULT_JSON=" . json_encode($result) . "\n";
if ($triggered) {
    echo "AUDITAGENTX_VULN_TRIGGERED\n";
} else {
    echo "AUDITAGENTX_NO_TRIGGER\n";
}
?>

logs: 候选漏洞由 AuditAgent 产生
ExploitAgent 生成利用方案: exec-use
HTTP 动态验证跳过: 未匹配专用规则，默认尝试函数级 Harness 验证
未匹配专用规则，默认尝试函数级 Harness 验证
Docker 沙箱: started（健康检查 passed）

summary.executive_summary: 本次审计对象为 OWASP-Vulnerable-Web-Application，来源为 https://github.com/OWASP/Vulnerable-Web-Application，项目主要语言为 PHP，框架识别结果为 未识别，共解析 28 个文件、1229 行代码。AuditAgentX 的流程先由 RepoParserAgent 建立项目画像，再由 StaticScanAgent 调用静态规则和 SAST 工具产生候选漏洞，AuditAgent 补充语义层面的风险发现，VerifyAgent 独立复核并过滤误报，随后 ExploitAgent/DynamicVerifier 对可验证漏洞生成授权 PoC 并保存运行证据，最后由 SummaryAgent 汇总为本报告。当前共发现 46 条风险，其中 Critical 0 条、High 11 条、Medium 18 条、Low 17 条；静态分析覆盖 46 条，动态验证覆盖 2 条，其中 0 条已复现。主要风险类型集中在 XSS(29)、tainted-sql-string(5)、tainted-exec(4)、exec-use(3)，总体风险评级为 HIGH。
summary.static_summary: 静态分析阶段合并 SAST 工具、硬编码密钥检测和自定义规则结果，共形成 46 条静态风险。主要来源分布为 custom-taint(33)、semgrep(13)。这些结果先作为候选项进入 VerifyAgent，避免仅凭规则命中直接下结论。
summary.dynamic_summary: 动态验证阶段对 2 条漏洞保存了运行证据，其中 0 条具备可复现结果。报告中的 Source、Sink、调用路径、PoC 和 runtime 证据共同构成证据链。
workflow_summary: RepoParserAgent：解析仓库结构、语言、框架、入口文件、依赖与代码规模，为后续审计提供项目画像。
StaticScanAgent：调用 Semgrep、Gitleaks、自定义规则等工具进行静态扫描，产出 SQL 注入、命令注入、路径遍历、硬编码密钥等候选风险。
AuditAgent：基于 LLM 对代码上下文做语义审计，补充传统 SAST 工具可能漏掉的业务逻辑与调用链风险。
VerifyAgent：独立复核候选漏洞，调用本地代码上下文读取、启发式分析和 SAST replay 工具过滤误报。
ExploitAgent / DynamicVerifier：为已确认漏洞生成授权 PoC、触发路径和利用代码，并在本地靶场或授权目标上保存动态验证证据。
SummaryAgent：汇总项目概况、静态/动态结果、证据链和修复优先级，生成执行摘要与修改建议。
key_risks: HIGH exec-use 位于 C:\Users\52697\Desktop\2026小学期\AuditAgentX\data\projects\proj_8448dda7\CommandExecution\CommandExec-1.php:25，状态为 confirmed。
HIGH exec-use 位于 C:\Users\52697\Desktop\2026小学期\AuditAgentX\data\projects\proj_8448dda7\CommandExecution\CommandExec-2.php:25，状态为 confirmed。
HIGH exec-use 位于 C:\Users\52697\Desktop\2026小学期\AuditAgentX\data\projects\proj_8448dda7\CommandExecution\CommandExec-4.php:44，状态为 needs_review。
HIGH phpinfo-use 位于 C:\Users\52697\Desktop\2026小学期\AuditAgentX\data\projects\proj_8448dda7\FileInclusion\info.php:2，状态为 needs_review。
HIGH tainted-sql-string 位于 C:\Users\52697\Desktop\2026小学期\AuditAgentX\data\projects\proj_8448dda7\SQL\sql1.php:40，状态为 needs_review。

remediation_plan.title: 优先修复 Critical/High 漏洞
remediation_plan.detail: 先处理已确认、已复现或处于核心入口路径上的高危问题，修复后重新扫描并保留复测证据。

remediation_plan.title: 按漏洞类型批量治理
remediation_plan.detail: 对 SQL 注入、命令注入、路径遍历等同类问题统一采用参数化查询、白名单校验和安全 API。

remediation_plan.title: 补充动态验证覆盖
remediation_plan.detail: 为高危候选漏洞配置本地靶场或授权 URL，让 ExploitAgent/DynamicVerifier 生成可复现证据。

remediation_plan.title: 纳入持续审计流程
remediation_plan.detail: 将静态扫描、VerifyAgent 复核和报告生成接入提交前或 CI 流程，避免修复后回归。

summary.conclusion: 综合项目规模、漏洞数量、严重等级和验证结果，当前项目处于 HIGH 风险水平。建议先处理已确认的高危/可复现漏洞，再统一治理同类输入校验、权限控制、敏感信息管理和依赖安全问题。
